details: The agent wrote and executed code to fetch merged PRs and their CI check data from the GitHub API. It reported all 10 PRs with title, author, and CI status based on actual check data retrieved via API calls. The final count (8 of 10 fully green) was derived from real check results, not assumed. The agent met all requirements: 10 PRs listed, per-PR CI status, and a final count based on actual data.
